testcase.name: An uncaught error was detected outside of a test
testcase.classname: An uncaught error was detected outside of a test

failure.message:
The following error originated from your test code, not from Cypress.
> Cannot find module './commands'
When Cypress detects uncaught errors originating from your test code it will automatically fail the current test.
Cypress could not associate this error to any specific test.
We dynamically generated a new test to display this failure.

testcase.failure:
Error: The following error originated from your test code, not from Cypress.
> Cannot find module './commands'
When Cypress detects uncaught errors originating from your test code it will automatically fail the current test.
Cypress could not associate this error to any specific test.
We dynamically generated a new test to display this failure. at webpackMissingModule (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/src/cypress-support-file.js:11:50) at ./support/component.ts (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/src/cypress-support-file.js:11:135) at Function.__webpack_require__ (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/src/main.js:7422:42)
